changeSet.author: nexus-gmiaf.12
changeSet.rollback: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS nexus.relevance_log CASCADE

changeSet.author: nexus-gmiaf.12
changeSet.comment: RLS: ENABLE + FORCE + tenant_isolation policy on relevance_log

changeSet.author: nexus-gmiaf.12
changeSet.comment: Create search_telemetry table (event log; composite PK includes tenant_id)
changeSet.sql:
CREATE TABLE nexus.search_telemetry ( tenant_id TEXT NOT NULL, ts TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL, query_hash TEXT NOT NULL, collection TEXT NOT NULL, raw_count INTEGER NOT NULL, kept_count INTEGER NOT NULL, top_distance DOUBLE PRECISION, threshold DOUBLE PRECISION, CONSTRAINT search_telemetry_pk PRIMARY KEY (tenant_id, ts, query_hash, collection) );
-- BTree indexes for time-range + collection stats queries CREATE INDEX idx_search_tel_ts ON nexus.search_telemetry (tenant_id, ts DESC); CREATE INDEX idx_search_tel_collection ON nexus.search_telemetry (tenant_id, collection, ts DESC);
changeSet.rollback: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS nexus.search_telemetry CASCADE

changeSet.author: nexus-gmiaf.12
nexus-gmiaf.12
changeSet.comment: Create tier_writes table (event log; tier-discipline audit)
changeSet.rollback: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS nexus.tier_writes CASCADE

changeSet.author: nexus-gmiaf.12
nexus-gmiaf.12
changeSet.comment: Create nx_answer_runs table (event log; RDR-080 run metrics)
changeSet.rollback: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS nexus.nx_answer_runs CASCADE

changeSet.author: nexus-gmiaf.12
nexus-gmiaf.12
changeSet.comment: Create hook_failures table (event log; post-store hook audit)
changeSet.rollback: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS nexus.hook_failures CASCADE

changeSet.author: nexus-gmiaf.12
nexus-gmiaf.12
changeSet.comment: Create frecency projection table (live-mutable; GREATEST on re-import)
changeSet.rollback: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS nexus.frecency CASCADE

changeSet.author: nexus-gmiaf.12
nexus-gmiaf.12
changeSet.comment: Grant table privileges to nexus_svc role
